  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 531 aimed to ensure that all students in grades 1 through 12 receive age-appropriate mental health education.",
    "The bill sought to normalize mental health conversations from an early age.",
    "Under SB 531, students would learn how to identify feelings, recognize warning signs, and ask for help.",
    "The instruction regarding mental health would grow with students as they move through adolescence.",
